loss_description: Kitchen fire in food court unit, contained by sprinkler system. Minimal damage to adjacent units.
Electrical fire in metalworking shop, caught early by night watchman. Equipment damage only.
Burst water main caused flooding in warehouse section. Inventory and flooring damage.
Forklift battery charging station fire. Building damage and 3 forklifts destroyed.
Roof section collapse from accumulated snow load. Racking and stored goods damaged.
Break-in at distribution hub. Electronics and high-value goods stolen.
HVAC condensation leak damaged office area and server room.
Tropical Storm damage to storage facility roofing and external piping. Partial operational shutdown.
Severe hail damaged metal roofing on 4 grain storage buildings.
Lightning strike caused electrical surge, damaged grain drying equipment.
Straight-line winds damaged siding on 2 outbuildings.
Catastrophic refrigeration system failure. Complete loss of cold storage inventory ($1.8M) plus equipment replacement and BI.
Processing floor drain backup, contamination of production area.
Small grease fire in smoking facility, contained quickly.
Pipe burst on 14th floor during weekend. Water damage to 3 floors of office space.
